ralplan_architect_review.summary: The revised plan closes critic-required gaps with explicit, testable contracts: visual-only state without recommendation/play-distance/swing summary leakage, draft-string numeric input without direct Number(event.target.value) coercion, and testable reactive visual drivers. Current code still has old surfaces, but plan/spec target and forbid them.

ralplan_critic_review.summary: The iteration-3 PRD/test spec closes execution loopholes. Clarity, verifiability, completeness, big-picture alignment, principle/option consistency, alternatives depth, and risk/verification rigor all pass. No required changes.
